title: Improvado Launches Real-Time Marketing Analytics & Campaign Insights on Snowflake AI Data Cloud
description: Unlock real-time marketing intelligence and automate campaign monitoring directly within your Snowflake environment. Harmonize, transform, and analyze marketing data securely—with no data movement required.
